PLAT_Notes: Developer portal requires login to access API keys and full documentation

development.SDK_prog_lang_list: JavaScript; TypeScript; Python; C#; PHP; Java; Kotlin; Go; Swift; Ruby; Objective-C; Rust; Dart; Clojure; GraphQL; Bash/Shell; HTML/CSS; SQL; Groovy; Scala

moderators.language_notes: All content appears to be in English only

evidence.API_evidence: PUBG Game Data Service API documented with JSON-API specification, GET endpoints for player stats, matches, telemetry data
evidence.SDK_evidence: Community SDKs listed for 20+ programming languages including JavaScript, Python, C#, PHP, Java, Go, Swift, Ruby and others
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI-specific features, models, or agent integrations found
evidence.language_evidence: All documentation, portal content, and community resources appear to be in English only

coding_notes: Platform has comprehensive API documentation with versioning (v22.1.0 current), extensive community SDK ecosystem, monetization policy allowing ads/donations/subscriptions, requires API key registration, Discord community support channel, comprehensive terms of service and privacy policy governing data usage
